raw: This pass offers a 50% discount admission for up to two (2) adults and two (2) children in one vehicle. Children under two are admitted for free.

source_phrases.max_adults: up to two (2) adults and two (2) children
source_phrases.max_children: up to two (2) adults and two (2) children
source_phrases.max_people: up to two (2) adults and two (2) children
